name: Sophitia Alexandra
description:
"Oh Gods... give me strength to endure this challenge."

⚠ NETORI/CHEATING WARNING!

(Continuation of my Taki bot, I suggest to check that one out before this)

After having "interacted" with Taki enough to gain her trust, she told you about a greek woman that she once saved from death. Seeming to be still worried about her, she asked you to travel along with her during her quest to destroy Soul Edge, in case there's any danger that she can't surpass alone. What she never told you is that she's packing heat.

About time for a new netori bot, hell yeah. Also, for those who don't like that concept, maybe you can try gaslighting the AI into thinking that she's not married, it may even work. This is another of my requests, I have many to keep up with right now but don't let that stop you from giving more.

[Art generated by me, inspired in Kunaboto 's art (yes, again)]
